error_signature: unable to merge results from Loop Over Items
title: Merging SQL results after Loop Over Items
symptom: After executing SQL queries in a Loop Over Items, the user cannot combine the results into a single object or array.
applies_when: Running SQL queries in each iteration
not_this_if: Results are already combined before the loop ends
Using a different method to aggregate results
root_cause: The Loop Over Items node processes each item separately, and without a proper aggregation step, the results remain fragmented. n8n requires an additional node to consolidate these results into a single output.
fix_steps: Add an Aggregate node to the 'done' branch of the Loop Over Items
Configure the Aggregate node to combine the results into a single list
agent_instruction: Use an Aggregate node after the Loop Over Items to merge all results into one object.
